title: Simple Block Breaker (and Placer)
description: Simple vanilla-friendly block breaker and placer for 1.21.1 and 1.21.11
body:
# Simple Block Breaker

### Simple vanilla-friendly block breaker and placer for 1.21.1 & 1.21.11


## Features:

*   Activate with redstone to either break or place a block
*   Hoppers/Pipes can insert/extract
*   Comparators can check inventory fullness
